Challenge1.title: AI Challenge 1: Explore the DXC Enterprise Prompt Library and submit your best prompt
Challenge1.description: Go to the DXC Enterprise Prompt Library (https://prompts.dxc.ai/) and explore the available prompts. Use the filters to narrow down your search, including by function, industry, and model. Once you have explored the library, submit a new prompt that your colleagues could use. Note: the prompt should be useful to your team, department or function. Comment with a screenshot of your submitted prompt on Viva Engage.

Challenge2.title: Wellbeing Challenge 1: Rainbow Walks
Challenge2.description: Office leads will be advertising for on site walks during lunch Between 18th-22nd May. The Rainbow Walk is a simple, inclusive wellbeing activity designed to encourage movement, social connection, and mindfulness. Participants take a short walk and capture photos that match a set of colours building a “rainbow” while taking time away from their desks.

Challenge3.title: AI Challenge 2: Use Copilot Premium in an M365 app of your choice to complete a task
Challenge3.description: Copilot Premium is now rolling out across DXC, bringing powerful new capabilities directly into the Microsoft 365 apps you already use, including Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, Teams, and OneNote. Using the app of your choice, complete a task with Copilot and explore how it can enhance the way you work. For example, you can turn notes into structured updates or documents in Word, analyse data and surface insights quickly in Excel, build a PowerPoint presentation from an outline or document, summarise long email threads and draft clear responses in Outlook, or catch up on actions and decisions from recorded meetings in Teams. To take part, comment with a screenshot of the Copilot prompt you used in one of the Microsoft 365 apps and explain what it helped you achieve. Please ensure your screenshot does not contain any sensitive information — if needed, you can redact details using the Windows Snipping Tool.

Challenge4.title: Wellbeing Challenge 2: Wellbeing Playlist
Challenge4.description: Music can lift our mood, reduce stress, and help us reset throughout the day. As part of our wellbeing challenge, we’re creating a shared DXC playlist filled with songs that make us feel happy, calm, energised, or simply good. To take part, comment 1–3 songs on the Viva Engage post that improve your mood or support your wellbeing. If you’d like, you can also share why the songs make you feel good, whether it’s a memory, an energy boost, or a calming effect. Feel free to explore and react to other people’s choices, and add more songs anytime throughout the challenge as we build a playlist everyone can turn to whenever they need a lift.

Challenge5.title: AI Challenge 3: Build your own AI agent
Challenge5.description: You can now build your own personal AI agents in Amazon Quick to help improve productivity and give you more time to focus on the work that matters most. No coding, data science, or advanced prompt engineering skills are required — if you can describe how you work, you can build an agent. This task involves opening Amazon Quick at https://us-east-1.quicksight.aws.amazon.com/, navigating to Chat agents → (+) Create chat agent, then adding instructions, connecting context, and experimenting with your new agent. If you’re unsure where to start, the DXC Knowledge Navigator agent can guide you through the process. To complete the challenge, comment on the Viva Engage post with a screenshot of your agent and a short description of what it helps you achieve. Please ensure no sensitive information is visible in your screenshot. Once submitted, the admin team will reply with a code to redeem.
